## 🔄 Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (fixes a broken feature or visual glitch)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (adds new functionality or a new page)
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX improvement (styling, layout, or accessibility changes)
- [ ] 📖 Content update (fixing text, updating links, or swapping images)

## ✅ Deployment & Testing Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have tested these changes on a desktop browser.
- [ ] I have tested these changes on a mobile screen size.
- [ ] I have checked that my changes are accessible (e.g., alt tags on new images, good color contrast).
